name: notification-bell
description: An icon-button with an inline unread-count badge that opens a native-popover notification history panel. Icon-only bell button (aria-label embeds the count); unread count badge is inlined (self-contained, no badge partial dependency); items are List-of-Map (keys: id, variant, message, description, timestamp, read) so no dev.lievit import is needed. Panel is role=region with a <ul><li> item list in natural tab order (no roving tabindex). Positions via CSS Anchor Positioning (light-dismiss + Esc built-in). Bell button follows the sm/md/lg height-based toolbar-alignment scale. Token-driven, CSP-clean, zero JS shipped.
docs: Copies notification-bell.jte to your JTE root at lievit/notification-bell.jte, reached as @template.lievit.notification-bell(unreadCount=N, items=itemList, bellAriaLabel="Notifications"). Items are java.util.List<java.util.Map<String,String>> with keys id/variant/message/description/timestamp/read. The panel opens/closes via the native browser popover API; no JS is required. The bell button's aria-label embeds the unread count for AT. Wire clear-all via clearAllWireClick; the button is absent when null. The source is yours: edit freely.
